ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 13, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-20-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian, Bailiff: Henry. Plaintiff John Nye Gulick was sworn and examined. Good cause appearing, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $8,673.49, Prejudgment Interest: $504.8l and Costs: $224.00. Judgment signed.
